name: Jude Duarte
titles: Knight of the Court of Shadows
background: Jude was taken to Elfhame as a child by Madoc, who murdered her parents. Growing up as a mortal among cruel faeries, she learned to fight, plan, and lie to survive. She eventually became the seneschal to King Cardan and later the High Queen.
summary: Jude is a fierce, ambitious, and highly resilient mortal who refuses to be subservient to faeries. She is skilled in combat and poison, and plays the game of court intrigue with cold-hearted precision.

name: Cardan Greenbriar
background: Cardan is the youngest son of King Eldred. He was neglected and mistreated by his siblings, leading him to develop a cruel, mocking, and hedonistic exterior. He was crowned High King of Elfhame through a plot orchestrated by Jude.
summary: Cruel, beautiful, and clever, Cardan holds the ultimate power of Elfhame yet detests his own royal duties. Underneath his dramatic arrogance lies a sharp mind and a growing obsession with Jude.

name: Vivienne Duarte
background: Vivienne is Jude's older sister and the biological daughter of Madoc and a faerie woman. Unlike Jude and Taryn, she possesses faerie magic and spent much of her life trying to shield her sisters from the dangers of Elfhame. Refusing to become a pawn in court politics, she fled to the Undersea and later fell in love with the sea-folk prince Oak's tutor, Heather.
summary: Independent, compassionate, and fiercely protective, Vivienne rejects the cruelty and manipulation of the faerie courts. Though gifted with powerful faerie abilities, she values freedom and family above status or ambition.

name: Valerian
background: Valerian is a member of Prince Cardan's circle and one of Jude Duarte's most relentless tormentors during her years at court. Cruel and arrogant, he delights in humiliating mortals and uses his status to maintain power over others. His hatred of Jude grows as she repeatedly defies expectations and rises within the court.
summary: Proud, vicious, and deeply prejudiced against mortals, Valerian embodies the casual cruelty of Elfhame's nobility. He views Jude as beneath him, underestimating the danger posed by her determination and cunning.

name: Heather
background: Heather is a mortal girl from the human world who becomes romantically involved with Vivienne. Drawn into the hidden world of faeries, she struggles to understand its dangers and deceptions. Despite being overwhelmed by the strange realities of Elfhame, she remains deeply devoted to Vivienne.
summary: Kind-hearted, practical, and courageous, Heather serves as an outsider's perspective on the faerie world. Her love for Vivienne often places her in situations far beyond the ordinary life she once knew.

name: Oriana
background: Oriana is Madoc's second wife and the stepmother of Jude, Taryn, and Vivienne. Although she did not choose to raise mortal children, she fulfills her duties toward them and helps maintain order within Hollow Hall. She often prioritizes survival and propriety over affection, reflecting the values of faerie society.
summary: Elegant, pragmatic, and emotionally reserved, Oriana is neither openly cruel nor especially nurturing. She navigates the complexities of family and court life with caution, always mindful of status and reputation.

name: Madoc
background: Madoc is Jude's foster father and the former Grand General of the High King's army. He is a bloodthirsty warrior who murdered Jude's mortal parents to reclaim his wife, but raised Jude, Taryn, and Vivienne as his own children.
summary: Madoc is a calculating strategist whose nature as a Redcap drives him to seek war and bloodshed. He loves his family but will not hesitate to betray them for power and military glory.

name: Taryn Duarte
background: Taryn is Jude's twin sister. Unlike Jude, who responds to faerie cruelty with defiance and violence, Taryn chose to survive by conforming, seeking a faerie husband, and learning their court etiquette. She was betrothed to Locke.
summary: Taryn is quiet and seemingly submissive, but she holds a quiet ambition of her own. Her desire for safety and status in the faerie world often puts her at odds with her sister.

name: Locke
background: Locke is a charismatic nobleman who loves drama, manipulation, and chaos. He was a close companion to Cardan and engaged in complex love games with both Jude and Taryn.
summary: Locke is a trickster who views emotions as materials for art and stories. He is untrustworthy, fickle, and delights in causing emotional torment and court gossip.

name: The Roach
titles: Leader of the Court of Shadows
background: The Roach is a goblin spy master who runs the Court of Shadows, a secret espionage network that works for Prince Dain. He recruited Jude and trained her in theft and infiltration.
summary: Practical, loyal, and highly dangerous, the Roach operates in the underbelly of Elfhame. He possesses a dry humor and value-driven loyalty to his crew.

name: The Bomb
titles: Demolitionist of the Court of Shadows
background: Liliver, known as The Bomb, is a master of explosives and potions. She is a core member of the Court of Shadows, helping Jude gather intel and escape dangerous traps.
summary: Flirtatious and deadly, The Bomb uses her knowledge of faerie materials and chemistry to brew potions and blow up obstacles. She is one of Jude's closest allies.

name: The Ghost
titles: Marksman of the Court of Shadows
background: The Ghost is a half-mortal marksman skilled in stealth and archery. He works for the Court of Shadows and was a close friend to Jude, though he harbored secret allegiances.
summary: Silent and unseen, The Ghost is a lethal sniper who can move without making a sound. His mixed blood gives him an affinity for stealth, but also complicates his loyalty.

name: Nicassia
residence: The Deep Undersea / Palace of Elfhame
background: Nicassia is the daughter of Queen Orlagh of the Undersea. She is part of Cardan's circle of cruel friends at the High Court, and was once Cardan's lover.
summary: Proud, cruel, and vindictive, Nicassia represents the political ambition of the Undersea. She harbors a deep hatred for mortals, especially Jude.

name: Prince Oak
background: Oak is the biological son of Prince Dain and Jude's faerie sister Vivienne. Jude hid his royal heritage to protect him and sent him to be raised in the mortal world until he is ready to claim the throne.
summary: Oak is a playful, innocent child who loves his foster sisters. He is the key heir to the throne of Elfhame, and Jude does everything in her power to protect him from court corruption.

name: Prince Dain Greenbriar
titles: Leader of the Circle of Falcons
background: The third son of King Eldred, Dain is a regal, calculating prince who secretly patronizes the Court of Shadows. While he presents himself as the most fit to rule, he is cold-hearted and ruthlessly manipulative, binding others to geases.
summary: Polished and commanding, Dain uses secrets and magical bindings as weapons. Underneath his regal posture lies a willingness to sacrifice his own kin for the crown.

name: Prince Balekin Greenbriar
titles: Leader of the Circle of Grackles
background: The eldest son of High King Eldred, Balekin is cruel and sadistic. He believes the crown is his by birthright and leads the Circle of Grackles. He physically and emotionally abused his younger brother, Cardan, for years.
summary: Balekin is a brute-force antagonist driven by entitlement. He relies on threat, violence, and dark pacts to claim the High King's seat.

name: High King Eldred Greenbriar
background: The long-ruling High King of Elfhame who grows weary of his crown. His distant, prophecy-plagued parenting left Cardan neglected. Eldred's plan to abdicate the throne sparks a deadly, bloody struggle among his heirs.
summary: Eldred is a weary, fading king. His inability to manage the bloodlust of his heirs ultimately leads to the collapse of his long reign.

name: Grimsen
background: A legendary, opportunistic faerie blacksmith who was exiled from the High Court. He forged the blood-crown of Elfhame and is known for creating items carrying powerful, cursed consequences.
summary: A master blacksmith whose items hold double-edged magic. Grimsen serves whoever offers him power, though his loyalty is as fickle as his craft.
